rationale: The synthetic ensures is `big_conj ==> det_equal`, so the per-state ensures conjuncts are not free hypotheses — a bare top-level `assert(forall|i| ...)` would fail. Wrapping the proof in `if (full_antecedent) { ... }` puts every conjunct in scope, and inside we do the pointwise `i == index` / `i != index` case-split on `page_array@[i]` (closing the `i == index` branch via fieldwise `=~=` on Page, and the `i != index` branch via the two ensures foralls) and finish with `Seq` ext-equality `post1_self_.page_array@ =~= post2_self_.page_array@`.
